'''Morto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] in the [[One Sith]].

==Biography==
Morto had joined [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]] by [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], as he had trained under [[Lomi Plo]], who disappeared in that year. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], his feelings for his former [[Sith Master/Legends|Master]] were still strong, so much that he had been in love with Lomi Plo.<ref name="Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>

By this date, Morto was serving as the gatekeeper of the Sith complex in the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. Although he had been a Sith for over a decade, [[Alema Rar]]'s arrival at the fastness was treated as a practice session for him, making it possible that he was still regarded as a learner.<ref name="Inferno" />

The [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] initially bested the Twi'lek Jedi Knight, but he was called off by a high-ranking [[Raspy-voiced woman|female Sith]], in order to allow [[White Eyes]] to interrogate Alema. Once the questioning was concluded, Morto was ordered to fight and kill her, but Alema managed to persuade the Sith to let her live—and when the Togorian was about to stand down, he was flung violently against the walls of the courtyard by White Eyes, believing that he failed to obey.<ref name="Inferno" />

After the initial attack, Alema had given him a vial, the contents of which he spread onto the dart wound she had inflicted, assuming it to be an antidote for the toxin. Instead, she had actually provided him with flesh-eating bacteria from [[Tenupe]] in exchange for his earlier revulsion to her deformed appearance.<ref name="Inferno" />

==Personality and traits==
Tall, muscular, and physically impressive, Morto wore a dark cloak and armor. His fur had been shaved to display a pattern of [[Sith tattoo]]s. Morto was armed with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and was strong enough in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to pin down a trained [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] with [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Crush|Force Crush]] and to resist the painful effects of a poison dart.<ref name="Inferno" />

==Behind the scenes==
It is not clear whether Morto had retained his own name, as was apparently the case with his own Master, Lomi Plo, and her sometime partner [[Welk]], or if he was using a [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] title, as was the custom of the new Sith Order he was a part of.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
